sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18346" key="a)fi/lautos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφίλ-αυτος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n18346.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not showing self-love,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.542b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
